title: Blooming Cherry Blossoms
description: Blooming cherry blossoms bursting forth in your hot bath water, this 3-in-1 bath bomb creates sedate pink water that calms the mind with scents of gentle florals.
ingredients: Cananga Odorata Flower Oil (Ylang Ylang Oil)

images.alt: Blooming Beautiful. A triple-sectioned bath bomb in the shape of a 5-pointed Cherry Blossom flower. The product consists of a large white flower base, with a removable pink flower lid, which houses bath salts.
A Blooming Cherry Blossoms bath bomb, with a small pink flower centred on a larger white one, sits on a pink podium. A real blossoming branch curves behind it against a soft blue background.
A model's hand holds the "Blooming Cherry Blossoms" bath bomb with a pink floral centre. It is held over bathwater filled with swirls of pale pink foam and vibrant pink patterns.

The image shows the model's hand tilting the Blooming Cherry Blossoms bath bomb, pouring out white bath salts into pink, swirling water. The small pink flower from the centre had been removed, revealing a hollow core filled with bath salts.

An aerial view of the bath after using the Blooming Cherry Blossoms bath bomb. There are swirling patterns of pale pink foam and vibrant magenta ripples and a marbled texture across the surface, with a dense white frothy area in the centre.

An aerial view of the "Blooming Cherry Blossoms" bath bomb with a smaller pink flower centre floats in the middle of a bath. It is surrounded by a large circle of frothy white bubbles and swirling patterns of vivid pink in the water.
